name: Woods Logistics LLC
districts_or_customers: Virginia DMAS / Cardinal Care Medicaid NEMT brokers (likely)
recent_news: Registered as a Virginia LLC in 2021; listed as a non-emergency medical transport (van) provider in Stephenson, VA and federal SAM.gov registrant - no M&A activity identified.
fit_notes: Micro NEMT van operator in Frederick County VA outskirts (Winchester area); no confirmed school district contracts and not a yellow-bus operator. Too small/peripheral to be a meaningful Summit tuck-in unless bundled with other regional NEMT routes.

name: Silverline Private Car & Limou
recent_news: No web presence located; no acquisition or news identified. Name truncated in source ('Limou'='Limousine'). Operates from a residential/mixed address in Hudson County, NJ.
fit_notes: Appears to be a small private car/limo service flagged as 'special_needs' in the source list - likely livery/Type S student carrier rather than a yellow school-bus contractor. Not a strategic fit for a yellow-bus platform like Summit; pass unless validated as a true Type-S contracted NJ school transporter.

name: O T Transportation LLC
recent_news: No verifiable web presence for the New Orleans entity at 1455 N Villere St. The FMCSA-listed 'OT TRANSPORTATION LLC' (USDOT 2097986) is a separate Mississippi-based 15-truck property/freight carrier in Terry, MS - not the same company and not a passenger operator.
fit_notes: Micro operator in Treme/7th Ward New Orleans, no confirmed school-district contracts, likely Medicaid NEMT van. Not a meaningful yellow-bus tuck-in for Summit.

name: A G Medical Transportation Inc
districts_or_customers: Illinois HFS Medicaid NEMT broker network (presumed)
recent_news: Independent NEMT operator in Northbrook, IL led by Akshay Patel; no M&A, safety, or growth news identified.
fit_notes: Owner-operated North Shore Chicago NEMT shop, not a yellow school-bus contractor. Categorized as 'special_needs' likely reflects medical/disability transport rather than SPED school routing. Marginal fit for Summit unless contracted with a North Shore district.

name: City Wide Transportation
recent_news: Small Phoenix-metro operator (Peoria, AZ) with BBB profile but no rating and limited disclosure; not BBB-accredited. No M&A or growth news identified.
fit_notes: Micro Phoenix West Valley van/livery operator; no confirmed yellow-bus or large district contract. Not a strategic Summit tuck-in unless validated as a Peoria USD or Dysart USD special-needs sub-contractor.
